summary: Completed comprehensive testing of updated Romanian SEO Automation landing page. All 15 specified features are working perfectly including updated navbar with exactly 3 links, hero section with Romanian diacritics, stats without icons, features in 4-column grid with gray badge, new Transparency section, pricing with correct amounts, testimonials, FAQ, footer CTA with 'Gata să începi?' badge, and footer with 'SEO Phoenix Martech Assistance'.
passed_tests: Navbar has exactly 3 nav links: Funcționalități, Prețuri, Testimoniale plus Autentificare and Începe Gratuit button
Hero section with correct Romanian diacritics: 'Automatizează-ți SEO-ul cu Inteligență Artificială'
Stats section shows 4 stats without icons - just green numbers and labels (10K+, 500+, 150%, 24/7)
Features section in 4-column grid with 12 feature cards
Features section has gray badge 'Funcționalități' (correctly changed from green)
Transparency section with 'Folosesti propriile tale chei API' content and €79 setup card
How It Works section with 3 steps (found as 'Cum Functioneaza')
Benefits section with 9 items (found as 'De Ce Noi')
Pricing section with 3 plans (Starter €19, Pro €49, Agency €99) - all prices correct
Testimonials section with 3 cards showing customer feedback
Footer CTA has 'Gata să începi?' badge
Footer shows 'SEO Phoenix Martech Assistance' with correct links: Termeni și Condiții, Confidențialitate, Contact
Mobile responsive design - hamburger menu works correctly
